---
title: ""
page-layout: custom
---
```{=html}
<!-- Three.js Library -->
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/three.js/r134/three.min.js"></script>

<!-- WebGL Background Canvas -->
<canvas id="bg-canvas" style="position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; z-index: -1; width: 100vw; height: 100vh;"></canvas>

<!-- Main Container -->
<div class="container" style="padding: 0 2rem 4rem 2rem; max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto;">
  
  <div class="hero-section" style="min-height: 80vh; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center;">
    <h1 class="hero-title">Hello, I'm <span class="hero-highlight">Lemon</span></h1>
    <p class="hero-subtitle">A 9th grader at Lynbrook High School exploring mathematics and machine learning.</p>
  </div>

  <hr style="border: 0; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); margin: 4rem 0;">

  <!-- About Intro Section -->
  <div class="section-title" style="margin-bottom: 2rem; text-align: left;">
    <h2 style="font-size: 2.5rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; color: #fff;">About Me</h2>
  </div>
  <div class="glass-card" style="margin-bottom: 4rem; padding: 2rem;">
    <p style="font-size: 1.1rem; line-height: 1.6; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">
      I'm a high school student with a deep passion for mathematics and its applications in machine learning. This digital notebook is where I document my learning journey, exploring topics like matrix calculus, information theory, and probabilistic models.
    </p>
    <a href="about.html" class="card-btn" style="display: inline-block;">Read My Full Story</a>
  </div>

  <hr style="border: 0; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); margin: 4rem 0;">

  <!-- Featured Notes Section -->
  <div class="section-title" style="margin-bottom: 3rem; text-align: center;">
    <h2 style="font-size: 2.5rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; color: #fff;">Featured Notes</h2>
    <p style="color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7);">A glimpse into my mathematical explorations.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="glass-grid" style="margin-bottom: 3rem;">
    <div class="glass-card">
      <h3>Linear Algebra and Matrix Mechanics for Machine Learning</h3>
      <p>Foundational concepts of vector spaces, matrix representations, and geometric transformations.</p>
      <a href="notes/linear-algebra.html" class="card-btn">Explore Notes</a>
    </div>

    <div class="glass-card">
      <h3>Probability for Machine Learning</h3>
      <p>The fundamental mathematics of uncertainty, random variables, and probability distributions.</p>
      <a href="notes/probability.html" class="card-btn">Explore Notes</a>
    </div>

    <div class="glass-card">
      <h3>Matrix Calculus for Machine Learning</h3>
      <p>Techniques for computing gradients, derivatives, and optimization over matrix structures.</p>
      <a href="notes/matrix-calculus.html" class="card-btn">Explore Notes</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div style="text-align: center; margin-bottom: 4rem;">
    <a href="notes.html" class="card-btn" style="padding: 1rem 2rem; font-size: 1.2rem;">View All Notes</a>
  </div>
</div>
</div>

<script src="/assets/bg-contour.js"></script>
<script src="/assets/card-tilt.js"></script>
```
